pages.title: Before 劫
pages.text: Do not open 劫 just because the glyph exists. It is the stave breakthrough challenge.$(br2)Use it when the held stave has full momentum and you actually want to unlock the next tier.

pages.title: Basic prep
pages.text: Standard prep: $(l)心 + 忍 + 净$().$(br)Dangerous arena: add $(l)稳$().$(br)Heavy melee pressure: add $(l)坚$().$(br2)Low tiers use 力 for offense. Diamond+ can use 怒.

pages.title: Failure
pages.text: Failure does not delete the stave. It only halves current momentum.$(br2)Repair durability if needed, refill momentum, and try again.

pages.title: Success
pages.text: The exact stave that opened 劫 receives the upgrade-ready mark. Then use the diagonal upgrade recipe in the crafting grid.$(br2)If you switch staves, the other stave does not inherit the mark.
